title: harpalyce cordata
intro: Harpalyce cordata, also known as the fire compass plant, is a plant species native to tropical America, belonging to the Fabaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Harpalyce cordata include its potential in reducing inflammation, managing blood sugar levels, and treating various infections. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made by infusing its leaves in water, and it can also be used as a tea or tincture, although its effectiveness and safety for human consumption require further research.
